entries.text: Whenever I feel overwhelmed, I automatically withdraw from everyone around me
Every time conflict arises, I tend to go quiet and wait for it to pass
I notice that I always default to people-pleasing when someone seems upset
I'm terrible at asking for what I need, I always end up settling for less
I can't stop second-guessing every decision I make, even small ones
I doubt my ability to handle things when they get complicated
I've been doing better at speaking up for myself this week
I finally managed to set a limit and actually stick with it

description: IC threshold met but all messages exceed MAX_QUOTE_LENGTH — claim emitted with no display quote

entries.text: I'm so terrible at finishing things that I start that I genuinely wonder if there is something fundamentally broken about how my brain approaches long-term tasks, because no matter what system or method I try I always end up abandoning it after a few days or so

I can't stop myself from replaying every single awkward or embarrassing conversation I've ever had for hours or even days after the fact, going through exactly what I said and why I always seem to make things far more complicated than they need to be at all

I always end up failing at things that matter to me, and the worse I do the more I tend to avoid trying again which just confirms to myself that I was probably right not to bother in the first place, and the whole cycle continues on and on indefinitely

notes: IC threshold met (3 messages), but all messages exceed MAX_QUOTE_LENGTH=250 — selectBestDisplayQuote returns null; claim emitted without a display quote

description: TC true positive — avoidance/procrastination response shape; should emit TC and generate avoidance visible summary

entries.text: I tend to avoid difficult conversations entirely whenever I feel any pressure or discomfort
Every time I have something important to do, I end up procrastinating until I'm overwhelmed by the deadline
I notice that I always put off anything that feels emotionally heavy or uncertain until the last moment
My default is to procrastinate whenever I'm facing anything that might involve tension or conflict

description: TC true positive — people-pleasing/appeasing response shape; should emit TC and generate pleasing visible summary

entries.text: I tend to apologize immediately whenever someone seems even slightly upset with me
Every time there is any hint of tension, I automatically start people-pleasing to make it go away
I notice that I always apologize or back down whenever someone challenges what I have said
Whenever someone pushes back on anything, I default to appeasing them even when I clearly disagree

entries.text: I tend to check in with multiple people whenever I am unsure about an important decision
Every time plans change suddenly, I immediately start looking for reassurance from others around me
I notice that I always reach out to someone when I am feeling uncertain or overwhelmed by a situation
Whenever something feels important, my default is to seek a lot of external validation before acting on it

entries.text: I always second-guess my decisions even after I have thoroughly thought them through
I am not sure I can actually handle situations well when the stakes are really high
I honestly doubt my ability to follow through when something really matters to me

description: IC true positive — incapability/self-dismissal shape; should emit IC and generate incapability visible summary

entries.text: I am terrible at finishing anything I start when there is real pressure involved
I always mess things up on the very day things were starting to look promising for me
I can not get past this habit of giving up right before things actually pay off
I keep failing at the things that matter most to me even when I am genuinely trying my hardest

description: IC true positive — all messages exceed display-safe length; IC emits and visible summary generates, but no display-safe quote exists

entries.text: I am terrible at maintaining any kind of consistent emotional stability when I am under stress or pressure, and despite sustained personal effort and professional support over many years, I continue to struggle with the same patterns that have held me back from showing up fully in situations that matter to me.

I always mess things up at the exact moment when I finally have enough momentum to feel genuinely hopeful about where I am headed, and this pattern seems to repeat regardless of how much preparation or effort I have invested in trying to do things differently this time around.

I can not stop myself from spiraling into worst-case thinking any time something important is at stake, and this reflexive catastrophizing has repeatedly cost me meaningful opportunities and relationships that I would very much have liked to preserve and develop over time.

I struggle with trusting myself to sustain any meaningful progress because I so often find ways to undermine my own efforts right at the point when they start producing the kinds of results I had genuinely been working toward, and I cannot explain why I keep doing this to myself.

description: RL true positive — second multi-session bundle with loop/regret language; should emit RL across two sessions and generate loop visible summary

I know this pattern well by now, same loop every single time no matter how much awareness I bring to it
